title: Public Finance (Prohibitition of Gate Fees on Goverment Departments and Institutions) Notice, 2002
title_en: Public Finance (Prohibitition of Gate Fees on Goverment Departments and Institutions) Notice, 2002

provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Public Finance (Prohibition of Gate Fees on Government Departments and Institutions) Notice, 2002 and shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1 st July, 2002.

It is hereby notified that, government departments and institutions such as hospital, post offices, airports and other similar public places are prohibited to charge any gate fees without written authority of the Minister for Finance.
